positive: Stylized central composition featuring a whimsical, highly detailed mystical forest scene. A luminous, stylized archway made of swirling vines and glowing crystals frames a path leading into a vibrant, dappled light source. The flora consists of exaggerated, bioluminescent mushrooms and large, geometrically perfect leaves. Subtle silhouettes of mythical, non-specific woodland creatures (such as stylized foxes or deer) are integrated into the foliage. The overall aesthetic is a harmonious blend of Art Deco symmetry and vibrant nature fantasy. High contrast, deep jewel tones (emerald green, sapphire blue, amethyst purple) contrasted with brilliant pops of neon yellow light. Designed for screen printing on apparel, emphasizing strong black lines and clean, printable areas. Flat illustration style with depth illusion.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermarks, noise, bad anatomy, low detail, low resolution, extra limbs, poorly rendered, bokeh, photography, logo, trademark, copyrighted, text-based
